left_hook_arm.display_arrangement: Single item centered on the hook
left_hook_arm.styling_note: The black mock neck crop top provides a sleek, minimalist base that aligns with the 'Rubby Fire' aesthetic's focus on bold, sculptural silhouettes.

right_hook_arm.display_arrangement: Single item centered on the hook
right_hook_arm.styling_note: The tie-front t-shirt features red tones that directly connect to the 'Rubby Fire' color palette, adding a vibrant, passionate accent to the display.

selection_reasoning: To adhere to the 'Rubby Fire' moodboard while showcasing a summer casual collection, I selected items that emphasize the red/black color story. The black crop top provides a minimalist, avant-garde foundation, while the red-accented tie-front shirt introduces the required vibrant, passionate energy. These items are lightweight and suitable for the hook arm fixture, creating a cohesive, high-fashion editorial look.
